trade.summary: Svizzera exports gold, luxury goods, pharmaceuticals, and watches to the EAU — Dubai is a major global gold trading hub. The EAU exports refined petroleum and re-exported goods to Svizzera. The gold trade dominates bilateral flows.

diplomatic.summary: Svizzera and the EAU maintain excellent diplomatic relations. Svizzera's neutrality and financial expertise make it a natural partner for EAU wealth management and diplomacy. A free trade agreement between the EAU and EFTA (which includes Svizzera) was signed in 2023.

military.summary: Svizzera's strict neutrality precludes meaningful military ties. Limited defense cooperation. Swiss arms export controls restrict weapons sales to conflict-adjacent regions.

financial.summary: Svizzera is a premier wealth management destination for EAU sovereign funds and high-net-worth individuals. Swiss banks (UBS, Credit Suisse successor) manage billions in EAU assets. Swiss Re and Zurich Insurance have major EAU operations. EFTA-EAU FTA signed 2023 deepens financial integration.

energy.summary: Svizzera imports some Gulf petroleum products. The EAU supplies a portion of Svizzera's oil needs indirectly via spot markets. Svizzera has no direct energy pipeline ties to the Gulf.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific collaboration through ETH Zurich partnerships with EAU universities, particularly in sustainability and AI. Svizzera and EAU collaborate on clean energy research.
